drl:
rule "R0"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1(f1 != false, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insertLogical(new T1(false, false, 12));
    insertLogical(new T1($b1_0_1, $b1_0_1, $p1_0.getF0()));
end
rule "R2"
salience($b2_0_0 - $b2_0_0)
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f0 > -4 && < -4, $b2_0_0 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    $p2_0.setF2(true);
    $p2_0.setF1("alpha");
    update($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
salience 9
no-loop
when
    exists T1(f2 <= -1000000007, f0 == true)
    T1(f2 < 8, $b3_1_0 : f1, $b3_1_1 : f2)
    T0(f2 != true || f1 in ("ab", "zz"), $b3_2_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R4"
salience -7
no-loop
when
    $p4_0 : T0(f2 == false, f2 == true, f2 == false)
then
    modify($p4_0) { setF2(true) }
end
